programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Garden Zoo. It's Saturday, and Tish wants to watch her 'Zoo Friends' TV show, but her mum insists she finish her chores.
Surprise Machine. Children's animation. Bing and Sula have a penny each for the surprise machine in Padget's shop. Sula gets the item she wants, but Bing does not.
Blow. Preschool series. It's a windy day and the Teletubbies collect lots of leaves that have blown off the trees. The leaves go everywhere in Home Dome, so the Noo-noo cleans up.
The Best. Tee's friends Tomo and Lily seem to be the best at everything. Tee wonders what he is the best at?
Winter Wonderland. Evil Pea chases the Veggies with a giant snowball after covering the supermarket in ice.
Squiggle. Bing and Coco are drawing Gilly a picture, but when Bing goes to say hello, Charlie does a big squiggle on Bing's drawing! Gilly then shows them a game called 'squiggling!'.
Breakdown Bryan. Bryan the ferry can't shut his engine off, so he's speeding out of control around the lake. How will Mojo and Bo get aboard to take control and steer Bryan to safety?
Potato Time. At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!
The Sharing Badge. Duggee and the Squirrels bake a pie and learn how to share by dividing things equally.
Tina. Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend to show Mum and Dad who's boss.
Cafe. Bluey learns that adults take a little bit longer to make friends.
Monkey Bay, Thailand. The Go Jetters have to save the tourists from a frosty disaster when Grandmaster Glitch builds a hotel in Monkey Bay and some cheeky macaques take his Grim-o-freeze.
The Tale of the Tiny Terror. Animated series. Peter's plans to raid Mr McGregor's garden are thwarted when he discovers the Shrew has got there first.
Honeybees. The Octonauts help a colony of honeybees that are trapped in a sinking tree.
The Pyramid of Puzzles. The Numberblocks explore a mysterious pyramid full of bar charts. They must read the clues to discover the pyramid's secrets - and to find their way out again!
Fox. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Honeycomb. The children are in the meadow. The Nogglins discover a land of hexagons, and everywhere looks the same. Itty leads the way, but can she find a route back?
Show and Tell Day. Love Monster worries about showing people his favourite conch shell when everyone else has unicorn-themed items for their show and tell presentations.
Snail. Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have a snail slime race. But who will win, Team King or Team Queen?
Cabbage. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the marvellous Cabbage and his dazzling super-veggie memory skills!
Woof! Children's animation. Bing and Flop find a lost dog in the park, and Bing decides he wants to keep her. When the owner turns up, Bing is very upset about saying goodbye.
Lizard. Dee encourages a friend to say 'lizard', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. They see a brown lizard, a long-tongued lizard, a climbing lizard and even a lizard in a blizzard!
Elodie's Graduation. The bugs celebrate Elodie on her last day in Shell School.
Banananuts Harvest. The Piggies harvest banananuts, and Wilf offers to help...
More About Fitting Together. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos try to make a picnic bench by fitting together planks of wood, but are they following the instructions?
Down on the Farm. Justin and his friends meet a chicken, while Mr Tumble finds a worm.
Conga. Preschool series. The Teletubbies do conga dances over the hills, then they conga into Home Dome to answer the Tubby Phone and do a special conga Tubby Phone Dance.
Noisy. Giovanna, Baby Bear and everyone at The Baby Club explore noisy objects and toys through discovery, play, song and story time. Grown-ups and little ones at home can join in too!
Canal Boat. Elsee plays I-spy with her friend Athena whilst on a canal boat trip.
Midnight Feast. Maddie and Triggs try to sneak into the kitchen for a snack without waking up Mum and Dad.
Pizza Delivery Pup. Dylan the Pizza Delivery Pup wants to deliver a delicious pizza fast - but every shortcut is another adventure.
Biggest Fight Ever. Kiri and Lou have a big fight but find it's too hard not to be friends.
The Hole Banana. Bananaraptors fall into a hole, and Ginger and Pea-Rexes find a clever way to rescue them.
Kids. A quick trip to the shops proves tricky for Dad, when Bingo and Bluey want to play 'Kids'.
The Art Badge. The Squirrels learn about different types of art and what inspires them while preparing their own pieces for Tino the Artistic Mouse's Woodland Biennale.
A Very Cute Doll. The Game Catchers land on a woollen planet to play grab the hat.
Timmy's Big Search. When Timmy's glove puppet goes missing, he creates chaos as he hunts for it - digging up the sandpit, searching vehicles and frisking his classmates.
Iona and Elba: Elba's Birthday Party. Iona plans a birthday surprise for Elba, involving chocolate cake and a robot!
Vinnie's Bristolian Asparagus Tart. Vinnie's tarts are made of puff pastry with a cream cheese and asparagus topping. Yum!

programmes.show_name: Ferne and Rory's Teeny Tiny Creatures
programmes.show_description: Ants. Rory and Sandy visit a forest in search of wood ants, while Ferne meets a leaf cutter ant colony at the zoo. Also, find out why ants are amazing soil engineers!
Mission: Sleepover. Diesel's super ears investigate a strange noise that interrupts Rayane's sleepover party.
Bactrian Camel and Lynx. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's the Bactrian camel and the lynx.
Waffle Pop Dog. Doug makes a music kit and receives help to compose a song for the school show.
Pond Life. Oona tries to keep Baba clean on a muddy spring day.
Musical Show. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. The Small Potatoes sing and dance their way across the stage in a show-stopping musical number.
Feels Like Thunder. TipTop is an amazing drummer, and she is deaf too. She helps Yukee feel the music.
The Brave Banana Badge. Animated preschool series. It's a stormy day, and the Squirrels are scared of lightning. Fortunately, Duggee knows how to help them overcome their fears.
Bus. Preschool series about words. Dee encourages a friend to say 'bus', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure, exploring lots of different kinds of buses.
Rescue Racers. Get to know two new super-duper rectangles, Forty-eight and Forty-two.
Toad. Educational fun. M can't resist munching everything in sight until a giant toad appears. Suddenly he is not the biggest eater around!
Theatre. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Justin goes to the theatre with his friends while Mr Tumble puts on a magic show for Aunt Polly and Lord Tumble.
Ballet. Preschool series. Dipsy ballet twirls with the Tiddlytubbies, and the children in Tummy Tales put on a ballet show for their family at home.
Patchwork Caterpillar. Patchwork Caterpillar has a problem: his tummy won't stop rumbling! Can the Patchwork Pals find a way to help him?
Raa Raa and the Funniest Laugh. Animation set in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. The gang are looking for things that make funny noises, but they can't find one that makes everyone laugh.
The Fast, the Strong and the Wilson. Wilson goes for the gold to find out what he's best at as all of Chuggington is celebrating and competing in the Chuggtastic Games!
Episode 7. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. Professor Muddles uses his latest invention, the good-as-new machine, to try and make himself young again.
Downhill Machines. Grace races down a hill on a street luge, then shows up on a cool snow bike before getting to grips with a gravity bike!
Who Stole the Games? The Game Catchers land on the Chihuahua Planet to play zigzag race.
Artificial Reef. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. Tweak and her crewmates must convert the Gup-F into an artificial reef.
The Tale of the Dash in the Dark. Animated series. Peter and his friends go into the woods at night to catch a jar full of glow worms for Cotton-tail's night light.
The Water Badge. Animated preschool series. Happy lets a tap drip, wasting water. The Squirrels think water is limitless, and they explain where they think it comes from.
Goodnight, Baby Mouse. When Baby Mouse won't take a nap, Vida runs a sleep study to find out why.
Galactic Space Showdown. Supertato and Chilli are playing a computer game when Evil Pea takes it for herself. To get it back, they suddenly find themselves in a real version of the game.
Mission Dance. Weasy and the Ducklings must train together to beat the Chipmunk in a dance-off.
Stinkano. Mojo and Bo need to clear out Swoppiton before Preston's smelly sandwich 'stinkplodes'!
Tina. Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend to show Mum and Dad who's boss.
Mr Monkeyjocks. Bluey and Bingo must prove Mr Monkeyjocks is special to save him from being chucked out.
Brinicle Hits the Wrong Note. Brinicle tries to write a hit fundraising single, but is stumped for ideas.
Andy and the Treeshrew. Preschool wildlife series. Andy heads to the rainforests of Borneo in search of a treeshrew and its favourite food, mangosteens.
The Legend of Sir Waffle. Waffle has accidentally flooded Mrs Hobbs's kitchen and she's furious.
The Playground Wish. Rafi wishes for a magical zip line but realises playground fun means letting everyone have a turn.
It's Time to Make a Sorrel Drink. JoJo and Gran Gran make sorrel drinks together, and JoJo comes up with her own recipe that uses her favourite ingredients.
Train Fudge. Animation for preschool children. Sarah and Duck take an unexpected train trip whilst on their quest to buy some fudge.
Sweet Music. Stop-motion animation. A radio falls out of the sky. Tiny, Small and Baby Soup Dragon don't know what it is and are fascinated by the sounds that come from it.
Friend Song. MeMo and BaBa listen to the beautiful sounds that their friends are making all around them. MeMo and BaBa use those sounds to create a wonderful friendship song.
Who's Next on the Pinky Ponk? Series for young children. The Tombliboos ride the Pinky Ponk. They guess who will board next, but nobody notices the teeny-tiny Pontipines arrive.
Melissa McCarthy - Tropical Terry. Melissa McCarthy tells the story of Terry, a little fish who wishes he was as bright and beautiful as the tropical fish in Coral Reef City.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Baby Jake Loves Flappy Clapping. The adventures of magical Baby Jake and friends. Baby Jake and Pengy Quin go on a snowy adventure and play flappy clapping.
Gua Rusa, Borneo. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! Grandmaster Glitch's Halloween pumpkin isn't big enough, so he searches for fertilizer to help it grow.
Woof! Children's animation. Bing and Flop find a lost dog in the park, and Bing decides he wants to keep her. When the owner turns up, Bing is very upset about saying goodbye.
Extreme Snowy Sports Day. Love Monster brings Monster Teddy extreme skiing on Mount Fluffaroo even though he isn't tall enough and must rescue him when he falls from the ski lift.
The Sticky Sauce Situation. Fabio's yummy new sauce is so sticky that he gets stuck to Mojo's bonnet. They have to do everything together until Bo figures out how to 'unsticky' that sauce!
The Old-Fashioned Way. Koko has Old Puffer Pete feeling like his old ways are methodical and too slow.
Slippery Skins. Bananaraptors shed their skin and become soft and limp, which is anything but intimidating!
Apple. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Apple singing in celebration of her great-great-grandad Apple Tree's hundredth birthday.   Followed by My Petsaurus.
Undercover Tomato. Tomato paints himself green and goes undercover as a Mini Pea to discover how Evil Pea is firing them at Tato Tower. He makes an unexpected new Mini Pea friend.
Chalk Dinosaur. Children's animation. Bing draws a fabulous stripy, spotty, zig-zag dinosaur, but just as he has finished, a rain shower washes the chalk dinosaur away.
Vaccination. Bing is brave for his vaccination as he is looking forward to the Hoppity Voosh sticker Dr Molly will give him afterwards. But then he finds out that there are none left!
The Walking Badge. The Squirrels learn the many ways you can walk with the help of friends and a catchy song.
Norrie's First Day. Norrie and her friends reflect on their first meeting and how Norrie enjoyed the peace of the Clubhouse away from her 72 siblings.
Maasai Mara National Park, Kenya. Animated adventure comedy series. The team roars into action as Glitch tries to take a selfie with a lion in the Maasai Mara.
The Tale of the Lost Tunnels. Animated series. When Benjamin gets lost in a network of underground tunnels, Peter and Lily set out to find him.
The Marine Iguanas. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts prepare for their annual seaweed feast near the Galapagos Islands.
Pirate Parade. Mojo and Bo fix Ted up as a pirate ship for the Pirate Parade, but swashbuckling Cap'n Dot hijacks him! Team Mojo must out-pirate Dot and sail the streets to stop her.
Chicken and Egg. Will Jaz get all her tasks done in time to be able to perform her egg dance with her dad?
Loud and Quiet. Ben and friends explore loud and quiet sounds at the park. Meanwhile, Grandad is napping, and Mr Tumble needs to keep quiet.
Chickenrat. It's bedtime, and Bingo can't remember where she left her beloved Floppy.
Pavlova. Mum won't let Bingo have pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of cafe.
The Mystery Badge. The Squirrels go to a fancy party at King Tiger's house and become embroiled in a mystery when the prized ruby centrepiece disappears from his party crown.
The Mixtape Badge. The Squirrels make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of their happy memories together.
Five Piris and a Little Egg. The Piris look after a special package for Shirley but get more than they bargained for.
A Place to Sleep. A playful Big Lizard accidentally breaks his own bath bed. Where will he sleep now?
Pea Shooter. The volcano is active, which means the baby Pea-Rexes get to play pea shooter.
Nomads, Mongolia. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! Grandmaster Glitch offends some nomads in Mongolia, so it's down to the Go Jetters to take the reins.
Mission Cow. Weasy smashes a hole in the grain store with his boomerang. The farmer thinks his cow is to blame and decides to sell it. The Ducklings need to sort this out!
Goblin and the Geyser/The Skeleton Stomp. Gobby takes over a geyser. Museum dinosaurs come to life.
Monarch Butterflies. The Octonauts guide migrating monarch butterflies on a journey south for the winter.
Seaside. Myrtle takes Sophie and Benjamin to the beach to build sandcastles, but she hasn't quite mastered the art! With Stan's help, they create an epic sandcastle for everyone to enjoy.
Supertato's Holiday. Supertato goes on holiday but can't relax because Evil Pea is sure to do something evil.

programmes.show_name: New: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programmes.show_description: Taking Credit. Ginger gets upset when the Heroes don't thank him for helping them battle Kranium.
T-Rex and Roar. Children's dinosaur history series. Andy travels back 65 million years to the time of Tyrannosaurus rex - his favourite dinosaur of all time.
Eric the Explorer. Eric the Explorer visits the cafe for something to eat, so they cook him something unusual.
Wind. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about wind.
Mandrill and Sand Lizard. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet two amazing animals and reveal a surprising connection between them in the wild. This time, it's the mandrill and the sand lizard.
Waffle's Birthday Surprise. Waffle's birthday surprise: puppuccino mishaps, birthday sing along and lots of tail wags.
The Get Well Soon Badge. Animated preschool series. Norrie is sick. Can the Squirrels think of something to cheer her up? Happy suggests a get well soon card!
Damselfish. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. The Octonauts help a group of algae-eating fish stand up to some aggressive damselfish.
Fergie's Wobbly Wheel. When Fergie's wheelchair breaks from doing an awesome trick, Vida asks Grandpa Beaver to make her a new one so that she can get even better and do more tricks.
Lake Titicaca, South America. Animated adventure comedy series. What goes up must come down! Grandmaster Glitch lands with a splash in Lake Titicaca.
The Cherry Tree Wish. Rafi's cherry tree grows too fast. She discovers nature likes to take its time.
Showdown on the Sundial Stage. When Rock Night is double-booked, everyone's beloved Sundial Stage quickly becomes a crowded and noisy place to be.
Cranberry. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the bouncing and singing Cranberries!
Let's Pretend. Justin and his friend play pizza restaurants, and Mr Tumble knits a jumper.
Dinosaurs. Toddlers and their grown-ups explore dinosaurs through play, songs and sharing a story.
Hide-and-Seek. The friends are all playing hide-and-seek. Lou is the seeker, but he falls asleep before he can count to ten!
Cesar's Big Idea. Cesar has a great idea, but maybe he is aiming too high.
Daphne's New Do. Daphne gets a Chewy-Fruity sweet stuck in her hair. Luckily, Vida is on hand to help.
Mo for a Morning. Preschool animation about a baby monkey and his mother. When Mo wakes up with a cold, Tee takes over mum duties.
Hawks or Hares?! The Game Catchers land on a Rocky Planet, where they learn the game hawks or hares -but turbulent weather causes the game to halt.
Wind Farm Beach. Elsee plays I-spy whilst on a beach walk with Mohamoud.
Farmer. Dylan the farmer wants to pick his crops at harvest time, but a persistent critter keeps trying to pick the food before it is ready!
Ludwig the Lady. Why did Mojo and Bo help Ludwig the 'chicken' cross the road? To lay an egg, of course!
Chaos Before the Storm. Angela accidentally creates a giant whirlwind that threatens the Peak City beach clean-up.
Bird Feeder. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers find out why bird feeders are helpful for hungry birds. They make their own orange peel bird feeders and hang them on trees for the birds.
The Jukebox Jam. When a jukebox washes up, its catchy song takes over the berg - to Pancake's annoyance.
Tomatina Festival, Bunol, Spain. Can the Go Jetters fix their own 'glitch' at the biggest food fight in the world?
A Million Dreams. Pink Bird takes to outer space to explore the dazzling stars and the planets as Mia and Nadeem perform A Million Dreams, from the Greatest Showman.
The Day We Landed. Cosima and Dad crash-land on an unexplored planet, Proxima B, and meet Big Lizard!
The First Wish. On her seventh birthday, Rafi receives her very first wishing wand. With a few important rules to learn, Rafi is ready to make some very exciting wishes.
The Bouncy Wish. Rafi's wish for trampoline feet makes bouncing fun, until it becomes too much. With her dads' help, she realises asking for support brings laughter, pancakes and hugs.
Double Babysitter. Both Uncle Rad and Frisky accidently turn up to babysit Bluey and Bingo.
Nikhil and Jay and the Happy Hospital. Nikhil and Jay create a hospital at home. They look after Nana, Jim, Amma and Appa, and try lots of ways to make their patients happy!
It's Time to Find Monty's Ball. When Monty loses his favourite ball, JoJo and Gran Gran decide to help him find it.
Ribbon Sisters. Animation. Sarah and her best friend Duck embark on simple but exciting adventures. Sarah and Duck are trying to exercise, but the neighbours need their help.
It's a Secret. Children's animation featuring a pair of siblings. Lola must keep Charlie's birthday surprise secret, but it is hard to keep secrets when Charlie tries to guess.
Hide-and-Seek. While everybody is busy reading books, Little Nana begins a hiding game. Everybody is excited to join in.
Tickle. MeMo and BaBa have fun playing tickle chase, but BaBa wants to stop playing. With the help of the Yummies, MeMo learns there is a time and place for tickles.
Igglepiggle's Blanket in Makka Pakka's Ditch. Series for young children about a magical place. When Igglepiggle loses his blanket, Upsy Daisy helps him look for it.
Josh Widdicombe - Teapot Trouble: A Duck and Tiny Horse Adventure. Josh Widdicombe tells the story of Duck and Little Horse investigating some teapot trouble.
